tilesets.notes: 1024x2048, 32x64 tile grid. Grass/dirt/water transitions, snow, sand, rock, bog variants. Created by bluecarrot16 (v7). Rows 0-15 cover basic outdoor tiles (grass at col 2-4, row 0; dirt at row 2; water-grass edge transitions); see terrain-v7.tsx for exact Tiled mapping. framesPerRow=32.

96x192, 3x6 tile grid (3 animation frames per column, 6 water tile variants per row). Columns 0-2 are animation frames for each water type. Row 0 = open water center, rows 1-5 = edge/corner transitions. From LPC Base Assets by Lanea Zimmerman.

640x640, 20x20 tile grid. Contains farming props, food items, village marketplace objects, wheat stacks, sacks, tools. Row/col layout: rows 0-4 crops and food, rows 5-9 props and furniture, rows 10-14 environmental objects, rows 15-19 misc. By Daniel Eddeland (daneeklu).
96x192, 3x6 tile grid. Fence post and rail tiles: horizontal, vertical, corner, end caps. By Daniel Eddeland (daneeklu).
96x192, 3x6 tile grid. Plowed/tilled soil tiles for farm plots. By Daniel Eddeland (daneeklu).

1024x4096, 32x128 tile grid. Multiple fruit tree species with seasonal states: bare, budding, blooming, fruiting (apple, cherry, pear, olive, peach, orange, lemon). Each species occupies ~16 rows. By bluecarrot16, Joshua Taylor, cynicmusic. CC-BY-SA 3.0.
192x224, 6x7 tile grid. Deciduous tree canopy tiles for compositing with trunk. From LPC Base Assets by Lanea Zimmerman.
192x96, 6x3 tile grid. Tree trunk base tiles. From LPC Base Assets by Lanea Zimmerman.
288x224, 9x7 tile grid. Farmhouse building tiles: roof, walls, door, windows, chimney. From LPC Base Assets by Lanea Zimmerman.

512x512, 16 frames/row. RPG cobblestone paths & town objects (Zabin, Daneeklu, Jetrel, Hyptosis, Redshrike, Bertram). Path autotile islands cols 0-11 rows 0-2; seamless full-bleed fill at rows 3-4 — frames 48 and 50 are clean grey cobblestone road tiles (49 has a grass tuft). Right cols 12-15 carry market-stall and produce props. CC-BY-SA 3.0.

512x2048, 16 frames/row (64 rows). LPC medieval village decorations. Hanging signs at rows 0-1: frame 6 plain board, 7 swords, 8 jug, 9 bread/loaf, 22 book, 23 beer mug, 24 INN. Lanterns/torches cols 12-15. Stone well at cols 0-1 rows 13-15: frames 208/209 (rim), 224/225 (body), 240/241 (base). Statues, fences, gravestones elsewhere. CC-BY-SA 3.0.

water.notes: 576x386 spritesheet by ZaPaper. Non-standard grid: 4 animation frames visible at y=0..162 (top block), each approximately 96px wide; waterfall variants at y=166-255 and y=224-386. For animated water tiles, use water_tiles.png (96x192, 3-frame animation at 32x32 per tile) from LPC Base Assets as the primary Phaser animation source. wateranimate2.png provides supplemental decorative water/waterfall elements.
